en.name: Chicken Tagine
en.description: Tender, slow-cooked Moroccan stew of spiced chicken braised with onions, garlic, lemons, and green olives. Served with couscous or rice for soaking up the fragrant, citrusy sauce.

tr.name: Tavuk Tagine
tr.description: Tender, slow-cooked Moroccan stew of spiced chicken braised with onions, garlic, lemons, and green olives. Served with couscous or rice for soaking up the fragrant, citrusy sauce.

de.name: Hähnchen Tajine
de.description: Tender, slow-cooked Moroccan stew of spiced chicken braised with onions, garlic, lemons, and green olives. Served with couscous or rice for soaking up the fragrant, citrusy sauce.

en.name: Lamb Tagine
en.description: Tender, slow-cooked Moroccan stew of lamb braised with onions, apricots, and prunes. Served with rice or couscous for soaking up the fragrant, citrusy sauce.

tr.name: Kuzu Tagine
tr.description: Tender, slow-cooked Moroccan stew of lamb braised with onions, apricots, and prunes. Served with rice or couscous for soaking up the fragrant, citrusy sauce.

en.name: Vegetable Couscous
en.description: Fluffy steamed couscous tossed with a vibrant mix of boiled seasonal vegetables and aromatic spices. Enriched with chickpeas, served warm as a hearty vegan main.
